nes.name: MesenCE
nes.notes: Best all-around standalone pick for NES.

snes.name: MesenCE
snes.notes: Shared with NES for a simple all-in-one setup.

gb.name: mGBA
gb.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gbc.name: mGBA
gbc.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gba.name: mGBA
gba.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

n64.name: Rosalie's Mupen GUI
n64.notes: Default N64 recommendation. Project64 remains the familiar Windows alternate.

psx.name: DuckStation
psx.notes: Requires a BIOS from the user's own console.

genesis.name: ares
genesis.notes: Current Genesis default for Easy Mode.

nes.name: MesenCE
nes.notes: Best all-around standalone pick for NES.

snes.name: MesenCE
snes.notes: Shared with NES for a simple all-in-one setup.

gb.name: mGBA
gb.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gbc.name: mGBA
gbc.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gba.name: mGBA
gba.notes: Recommended for GB, GBC, and GBA.

n64.name: Rosalie's Mupen GUI
n64.notes: Default N64 recommendation. Project64 remains the familiar Windows alternate.

psx.name: DuckStation
psx.notes: Requires a BIOS from the user's own console.

genesis.name: RetroArch (Genesis Plus GX)
genesis.notes: ares has no official Linux binaries; the Genesis Plus GX libretro core is the recommended path.

nes.name: RetroArch (Nestopia)
nes.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: MesenCE has an official ARM64 release for NES and SNES.

snes.name: RetroArch (Snes9x)
snes.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: MesenCE has an official ARM64 release for NES and SNES.

gb.name: RetroArch (Gambatte)
gb.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: mGBA is available via apt (mgba-qt) for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gbc.name: RetroArch (Gambatte)
gbc.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: mGBA is available via apt (mgba-qt) for GB, GBC, and GBA.

gba.name: RetroArch (mGBA)
gba.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: mGBA is available via apt (mgba-qt) for GB, GBC, and GBA.

n64.name: RetroArch (Mupen64Plus-Next)
n64.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: RMG (Rosalie's Mupen GUI) is available on Flathub for aarch64.

psx.name: RetroArch (Mednafen PSX HW)
psx.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64). Standalone alternate: DuckStation ships an official ARM64 AppImage.

genesis.name: RetroArch (Genesis Plus GX)
genesis.notes: RetroArch-first pick for Raspberry Pi 5 (aarch64) using the Genesis Plus GX core; no standalone ARM64 alternate is currently recommended.
